title: machine blocks + wire + import/registry
manager: `machine{}` blocks and a registry with `import`, so more than one machine can live in a document and be referenced by name — the structural precondition for systems. This is where FSL goes from one-machine-per-file to composable modules: a document declares several machines, wires them together, and imports others from a registry instead of copy-pasting.
cs: `machine{}` blocks; registry + `import` (fsl#1352); the modularity foundation systems build on; the F4 registry.
